text: About UPSDM - Uttar Pradesh Skill Development Mission. The Uttar Pradesh Skill Development Mission (UPSDM), under Department of Vocational Education & Skill Development (VESD), UP has been formed to focus on enhancing employability of the youth through skill development. The Mission is responsible for co-ordination of all skill development efforts across the Uttar Pradesh, removal of disconnect between demand and supply of skilled manpower, building the vocational and technical training framework, skill up-gradation, building of new skills, and innovative thinking not only for existing jobs but also jobs that are to be created. The Mission aims to Skill on a large Scale with Speed and high Standards in order to achieve its vision of Sabko Hunar Sabko Kam. UPSDM works to provide quality skill training to the youth of Uttar Pradesh to make them employable and self-reliant. UPSDM kya hai - UPSDM ek kaushal vikas mission hai jo Uttar Pradesh ke yuvaon ko kaushal prashikshan dekar rojgar yogya banata hai.

UPSDM क्या है - उत्तर प्रदेश कौशल विकास मिशन (UPSDM) व्यावसायिक शिक्षा एवं कौशल विकास विभाग (VESD) के अंतर्गत कौशल विकास के माध्यम से युवाओं की रोजगार क्षमता बढ़ाने पर केंद्रित है। यह मिशन उत्तर प्रदेश में सभी कौशल विकास प्रयासों के समन्वय, कुशल जनशक्ति की मांग और आपूर्ति के बीच अंतर को दूर करने, व्यावसायिक और तकनीकी प्रशिक्षण ढांचे के निर्माण के लिए जिम्मेदार है। मिशन का लक्ष्य है सबको हुनर सबको काम। UPSDM Toll Free Helpline Number 0522-4944200. Email: mdssdm-up@nic.in

About SPMU - State Project Management Unit. SPMU (State Project Management Unit) is the central coordinating body of UPSDM responsible for planning, implementation, monitoring and evaluation of all skill development programs in Uttar Pradesh. SPMU works at the state level to oversee training partners, ensure quality standards, manage certifications, and coordinate with sector skill councils. SPMU manages the overall skill development ecosystem in the state. SPMU kya karta hai - SPMU rajya star par kaushal vikas karyakramon ki yojana, karyanvayan, monitoring aur mulyankan ka kaam karta hai.

About DPMU - District Project Management Unit. DPMU (District Project Management Unit) operates at the district level under UPSDM. DPMU is responsible for coordinating skill development activities at the district level, monitoring training centers, facilitating candidate mobilization, and ensuring proper implementation of skill development schemes in their respective districts. DPMU kya hai - DPMU jila star par kaushal vikas gatividhiyon ka samanyavan karta hai, prashikshan kendron ki nigarani karta hai.

About Training Partners. Training Partners (TPs) are organizations empanelled with UPSDM to provide skill development training. To become a training partner, organizations need to respond to RFPs (Request for Proposals) released by UPSDM on their portal. TPs must meet eligibility criteria including minimum annual turnover, experience in skill training, and infrastructure requirements. Training partners can create multiple Training Centres (TCs) under them. TPs must provide a CA Certificate for annual turnover proof on letterhead with stamp, signature, date, CA membership number and firm registration number. Training partner kaise bane - UPSDM portal par samay samay par jaari RFP ke anusaar aavedan karke training partner ban sakte hain.

Contact Us SPMU - UPSDM Contact Information. Uttar Pradesh Skill Development Mission (UPSDM) Contact Details. UPSDM Toll Free Helpline Number: 0522-4944200. Email: mdssdm-up@nic.in. Address: Bapu Bhawan, 3rd Floor, 9 Sarojini Naidu Marg, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh 226001. For any help or problem related to registration, training, certification or placement, contact the UPSDM helpline. UPSDM ka phone number kya hai - UPSDM helpline number 0522-4944200 hai. UPSDM helpline number batao - 0522-4944200.

Success Stories - UPSDM Success Stories. UPSDM has transformed the lives of thousands of youth across Uttar Pradesh through skill development training. Candidates trained under various schemes like PMKVY, DDU-GKY and state schemes have found employment in diverse sectors. Success stories showcase how skill training has empowered youth from rural and urban areas to become self-reliant and contribute to the economy. Many candidates have started their own businesses after receiving entrepreneurship training. Success stories dikhao - UPSDM ke prashikshan se hazaron yuvaon ko rojgar mila hai.

Running Schemes - UPSDM Skill Development Schemes. UPSDM runs multiple skill development schemes including: 1. PMKVY (Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana) - A flagship scheme of the Government of India for skill development. PMKVY provides free skill training and certification to Indian youth. 2. DDU-GKY (Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana) - A scheme aimed at providing placement-linked skill training to rural poor youth. 3. State Skill Development Schemes - Various state-level initiatives for skill training. 4. BOCW (Building and Other Construction Workers) Scheme. PMKVY kya hai - PMKVY Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana hai jo yuvaon ko muft kaushal prashikshan deti hai. DDU-GKY scheme gramin yuvaon ko rojgar se juda kaushal prashikshan deti hai.

Course Details - UPSDM Available Courses. UPSDM offers training in over 40+ sectors with 600+ courses available. Courses cover sectors including IT-ITeS, Healthcare, Retail, Beauty & Wellness, Automotive, Construction, Electronics, Textiles, Agriculture, Tourism & Hospitality, and many more. Candidates can choose courses based on their educational qualification and interest. Course details and eligibility criteria are available on the UPSDM portal. What courses are available - UPSDM mein 40+ sectors mein 600+ courses uplabdh hain. Kaun kaun se course uplabdh hain - IT, Healthcare, Retail, Beauty, Automotive, Construction aadi sectors mein courses hain.

Downloads - UPSDM Downloads Section. Download important forms, documents and resources from UPSDM. Available downloads include: Candidate Registration Form, Training Partner Application Form, Assessment Guidelines, Certification Documents, Scheme Guidelines, RFP Documents, Annual Reports, and other important notifications. Download karna hai form - UPSDM portal ke Downloads section se sabhi forms aur documents download kar sakte hain. Where to download application form - Visit UPSDM Downloads page to download all application forms and guidelines.
